name: token-optimizer
description: Local-first context hygiene tooling for AI coding sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and reduce AI coding-session context waste.
interface.longDescription: Token Optimizer is a local-first context hygiene tool for AI coding sessions. It starts with explicit, read-only inspection workflows and avoids background daemons, network calls, broad hooks, and raw transcript or tool-output capture by default.
defaultPrompt: Run Token Optimizer doctor for this project.
Audit this repo for context hygiene issues.
Summarize this work for a future session.
